allow: Bash(rm -f /tmp/s_*.png && flutter test test/render_screens.dart 2>&1 | tail -15 && echo "---" && ls -la /tmp/s_*.png)
Bash(rm -f /tmp/s_*.png; flutter test test/render_screens.dart 2>&1 | tail -8; echo "=== PNGS ==="; ls -la /tmp/s_*.png)
Bash(rm -f /tmp/s_*.png; flutter test test/render_screens.dart >/tmp/render.log 2>&1; echo "exit=$?"; tail -4 /tmp/render.log; echo "==="; ls -la /tmp/s_*.png 2>&1)

Bash(rm -f /tmp/s_unlock_*.png; flutter test test/render_screens.dart --plain-name 'face unlock' >/tmp/fu2.log 2>&1; echo "exit=$?"; grep -aoE "All tests passed|Some tests failed" /tmp/fu2.log; grep -aoE "[A-Za-z' +]+\\[E\\]" /tmp/fu2.log | sort -u; ls /tmp/s_unlock_*.png 2>&1)

Bash(rm -f /tmp/s_unlock_*.png; flutter test test/render_screens.dart --plain-name 'face unlock' >/tmp/fu3.log 2>&1; echo "exit=$?"; grep -aoE "All tests passed|Some tests failed" /tmp/fu3.log; grep -aoE "[A-Za-z' +]+\\[E\\]" /tmp/fu3.log | sort -u; ls /tmp/s_unlock_*.png 2>&1)
